title: Possessing a stable trading method that suits you is a money-printing machine.
author: Much_Read8816
selftext: I’ve been using a relatively conservative strategy, and it’s helped me stay consistently profitable. The core idea is pretty simple: position sizing, diversification, and trend following, combined with some fundamental analysis to pick solid stocks or ETFs. This approach helps me manage big market swings while still capturing growth opportunities.If anyone’s interested, I’d be happy to share a more detailed, step-by-step guide for free. Would also love to hear your thoughts!I stick to a pretty conservative strategy, and it’s kept me consistently profitable. Nothing fancy  just position sizing, diversification, trend following, plus some fundamentals to pick quality stocks or ETFs. It helps smooth out volatility while still catching upside.If you’re interested, I can share a simple step-by-step guide for free. Curious to hear what you guys think

replies.author: Much_Read8816
replies.body: No, I'm not sharing anymore. I shared my strategy, but people still called me a liar, so I've stopped sharing.

replies.author: Due-Government2514
replies.body:
I get it Reddit can be like that.People are just super skeptical, especially when it comes to trading. A lot of them have been burned in the past, so they immediately assume the worst.

If you’re just looking to share, don’t let a few comments stop you. The people who truly get it will still see the value in what you have to offer.

replies.author: Hour_Ad_2653
replies.body: I'm working from home every day, and now I have some time to do some intraday and short-term trading. I'm still learning, so please share your strategies, buddy.

replies.author: Key_Letl
replies.body: Everyone is sharing their respective market analyses; we need to combine our insights to beat the market together.

comments.author: Far_Usual5389
comments.body: I need to know; please send me your strategy.

comments.author: Longjumping_Bad_9638
comments.body: Please share a copy with me. Naturally, those who are making money would simply disregard those who are losing it; however, I am truly in need of help. Thank you.

replies.author: Much_Read8816
replies.body: Send me a message; I'm not sure if my strategy will work for you.

comments.author: Euphoric-Phase-7407
comments.body: I lost $30,000. The market was terrible today. I need to understand how your strategy works. Can you help me?

replies.author: Much_Read8816
replies.body: Everyone needs a strategy that works for them, buddy!

comments.author: HeyItsYourDad_AMA
comments.body: "Relatively conservative strategy" and then shows a transaction with $75k down on put options. Lol this is the opposite of conservative

comments.author: NefariousnessFine902
comments.body: Post del genere non hanno molto senso

comments.author: AdditionalClimate952
comments.body: That’s a solid way to keep your head above water, especially with how volatile things have been lately. I've been trying to move away from just "vibes" and actually use data for my Solana trades, but have you found a way to automate that strategy without losing control of your own wallet?
